title: The Gamma-Loop: How AI Systems Stay Steady
sections: A Real Example: The Tidy-First Agent
stories: By accepting that there is 'nobody home' in the substrate, we are forced to build Better Loops
The reason people get 'grumpy' with AI is that they treat it like a person who should know better
If the coffee spills, we don't blame the agent's 'intelligence'; we blame the Tuning of the Loop
notes: Coffee cup as central metaphor throughout. Gamma-Loop + Learning-Loop distinction. Added architecture diagram. Added tidy-first-agent as canonical example.
key_insights: Gamma-Loop monitors state, tunes automatically, only escalates when needed
Tidy-first-agent is the canonical gamma-loop implementation
Alpha executes, Gamma monitors and self-tunes
Gamma-Loop accepts what AI is: a substrate, not a person
Coffee cup metaphor: don't think about it, it just works
